description.en: Get operating system identification from os-release file and return it as a dict. The os-release file is a freedesktop.org standard and is available in most Linux distributions. A noticeable exception is Android and Android-based distributions. Raises OSError or subclass when neither /etc/os-release nor /usr/lib/os-release can be read. On success, the function returns a dictionary where keys and values are strings. Values have their special characters like " and $ unquoted. The fields NAME, I...
